Size Inclusive Manufacturing

Plus Size & Inclusive Fashion

Custom plus size clothing manufacturing for brands that celebrate every body. Sizes 0-28, XS-6XL. Flattering fits, premium fabrics, and private label ready.

Why Brands Choose Us

Inclusive Manufacturing Excellence

✓

True Size Grading

Proprietary grading system from 0-28, not just scaled-up smaller sizes. Proper proportions at every size.

♡

Fit Models 0-28

We fit on actual plus size fit models to ensure every garment flatters curves, not just covers them.

★

Premium Stretch Fabrics

4-way stretch, recovery knit, and power mesh built into garments that need to move with the body.

♻

Private Label Ready

Your branded labels, inclusive size tags, custom packaging. Full brand identity from day one.

Ready to Launch Your Plus Size Line?

Get a free quote with sample pricing. We offer fit sessions, size set sampling, and full tech pack development.

Request Plus Size Quote Back to Home
